prompt:
Create a premium high-end commercial advertising poster for the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 graphics card, with the graphics card as the dominant hero product. Use the uploaded portrait photo only as the appearance and hairstyle reference for the female model: preserve face shape, facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportion, and overall temperament; do not copy the original expression, clothing, background, lighting, or pose. The model appears as a confident next-generation creator/gamer in refined modern techwear styling, positioned beside the GPU with a natural product relationship, as if presenting the power of the card. Futuristic black, gunmetal, silver, and electric green color system; cinematic studio lighting; sharp rim light; subtle volumetric glow; premium reflective materials; precise product edges; realistic cooling fins, fan details, and metal texture. Composition: vertical social-media launch poster, 4:5 ratio, product large in the foreground, model in three-quarter pose behind or beside it, strong depth, clean negative space for typography. Poster headline: “GEFORCE RTX 5090”. Subtitle: “Frames Beyond Limits”. Typography should feel clean, precise, futuristic, premium, and integrated into the scene without clutter. High-end electronics campaign visual, luxury tech advertising photography, realistic, ultra-detailed, polished, no watermark.

Negative Prompt:
watermark, random text, misspelled headline, garbled letters, logo distortion, low quality, blurry, plastic skin, extra fingers, deformed hands, bad anatomy, overexposed highlights, unrealistic lighting, oversmoothed skin, cheap e-commerce look, AI-generated look, warped electronics, melted GPU shape, incorrect fan structure, bent circuit board, cluttered background, exaggerated gaming cliché, distorted face, identity drift
